name: lexweave-monorepo
description: Lexweave — turn any long-form text into a progressively bilingual learning edition (diglot weave / graded reader engine).

scripts.test: tsc -b packages/tsconfig.json && node --test packages/core/test/*.test.cjs packages/compile/test/*.test.cjs packages/render/test/*.test.cjs
scripts.demo: npm run demo:compile && npm run demo:render
scripts.demo:compile: node packages/cli/dist/lexweave.cjs compile examples/demo/sample-book.txt --source zh --target en --provider mock --glossary examples/demo/glossary.json -o examples/demo/sample-book.lexweave.json
scripts.demo:render: node packages/cli/dist/lexweave.cjs render examples/demo/sample-book.txt --bundle examples/demo/sample-book.lexweave.json -o examples/demo/sample-book.html
